subject: [PATCH v2 079/110] ecryptfs: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: The patch is a straightforward replacement of PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings, addressing the change in i_ino type from u32 to u64.

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch series replaces the PRIino format macro with concrete format strings in ecryptfs, reflecting the change from i_ino being a u32 to a u64.
